chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P. No.D-1145 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For hearing of main case. 12.11.2025 M/s. Roshan Ali, Imtiaz Ali Channa, Mir Murtaza advocates for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G. Sindh along with Tariqaue Mebeen Sahito District Accounts Office Tharparkar at Mithi. The petitioners have approached with the grievance that they have been deprived of the “Hard Area Allowance” being regular employees of respondent No.4 / Project Director Sindh Lady Health Worker Program, Sindh @ Hyderabad while other employees were awarded the same allowance. In compliance of the previous order, the District Accounts Officer Tharparkar @ Mithi has submitted compliance report; the contents whereof are as under: - “In compliance of the order dated 29.10.2025 passed by Honourable High Court of Sindh Mirpurkhas. The compliance report in terms of the report submitted by the Secretary, Government of Sindh Health Department is hereby submitted as under: - That, the bills/claims in respect of 676 petitioners and 05 non-petitioners for the drawl of arrears of Hard Area Allowance for the period of 1st July 2017 to 30th November 2020 have been passed and incorporated to SAP System in the Bank Accounts of the concerned petitioners. (Copy of SAP System Generated Report is enclosed herewith as an evidence of compliance for kind perusal of this Honourable Court of Law). It is therefore, respectfully submitted that the requisite compliance of the order dated 29.10.2025 has been made in letter and spirit.” Accounts Officer present in Court submits that Hard Area Allowance shall be disbursed in the accounts of the petitioners at the end of this month.

The compliance report in terms of the report submitted by the Secretary, Government of Sindh Health Department is hereby submitted as under: - That, the bills/claims in respect of 676 petitioners and 05 non-petitioners for the drawl of arrears of Hard Area Allowance for the period of 1st July 2017 to 30th November 2020 have been passed and incorporated to SAP System in the Bank Accounts of the concerned petitioners. (Copy of SAP System Generated Report is enclosed herewith as an evidence of compliance for kind perusal of this Honourable Court of Law). It is therefore, respectfully submitted that the requisite compliance of the order dated 29.10.2025 has been made in letter and spirit.” Accounts Officer present in Court submits that Hard Area Allowance shall be disbursed in the accounts of the petitioners at the end of this month. Therefore, the purpose of filing this petition has been served, which is accordingly disposed of in terms of the compliance report. The petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
